'''vashoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mmmm|mmmm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mmmm|mmmm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vashoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væsheseth|væsheseth]] || [[word:væshesej|væshesej]] || [[word:væshesesh|væshesesh]] || [[word:væshese|væshese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vashoshosoth|vashoshosoth]] || [[word:vashoshosoj|vashoshosoj]] || [[word:vashoshososh|vashoshososh]] || [[word:vashoshoso|vashoshoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vashosoth|vashosoth]] || [[word:vashosoj|vashosoj]] || [[word:vashososh|vashososh]] || [[word:vashoso|vashoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vashofsoth|vashofsoth]] || [[word:vashofsoj|vashofsoj]] || [[word:vashofsosh|vashofsosh]] || [[word:vashofsof|vashofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vashosotho|vashosotho]] || [[word:vashosojo|vashosojo]] || [[word:vashososho|vashososho]] || [[word:vashosoko|vashosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vashosoth|vashosoth]] || [[word:vashosoj|vashosoj]] || [[word:vashososh|vashososh]] || [[word:vashoso|vashoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vashosothol|vashosothol]] || [[word:vashosojol|vashosojol]] || [[word:vashososhol|vashososhol]] || [[word:vashosokol|vashosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vashosothotho|vashosothotho]] || [[word:vashosojojo|vashosojojo]] || [[word:vashososhosho|vashososhosho]] || [[word:vashosoko|vashosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vashosothon|vashosothon]] || [[word:vashosojon|vashosojon]] || [[word:vashososhon|vashososhon]] || [[word:vashosokon|vashosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vashosothoro|vashosothoro]] || [[word:vashosojoro|vashosojoro]] || [[word:vashososhoro|vashososhoro]] || [[word:vashosokoro|vashosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
